name: company-discovery-actor
title: Company Discovery — AI-Powered Self-Evolving
description: Discovers companies with open positions. Uses Gemini to reason about coverage gaps and suggest+validate new job portals each run. Registry persists across runs in KV store.

maxCompaniesPerSource.title: Max companies per source
maxCompaniesPerSource.description: Maximum number of companies to discover from each source.

enableAiDiscovery.title: Enable AI portal discovery
enableAiDiscovery.description: Use Gemini to suggest and probe new job portals each run. Requires GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY secret.

maxAiSuggestionsPerRun.title: Max AI suggestions per run
maxAiSuggestionsPerRun.description: How many Gemini-suggested portals to probe and validate per run.
